title: Ubiquiti 12U Rack Cabinet, Wall mount, 450mm, perforated door
description: Ubiquiti UACC-Rack-12U-Wall-450-P is a one-piece 19" wall-mounted rack cabinet in 12U size, delivered fully assembled and equipped with a perforated front door panel , which â just like the removable side panels â can be locked to prevent unauthorized access. The door is factory-set to a left-hand orientation with the option to reverse it. With a depth of 450 mm , the rack cabinet allows the installation of networking devices up to 325 mm deep To ensure efficient cooling of active components, the rack cabinet is equipped with a pair of fans, keeping total noise levels below 50 dB(A). If you need to back up active devices using, for example, batteries, you will appreciate its above-standard load capacity of 50 kg. The enclosure features an elegant white finish with a powder-coated surface, and the Ubiquiti logo is present on the side panels. Cable entry points covered with blanking plates are available on the bottom, top, and rear… 19" Rack Cabinet (2) Keys (4) Screws with metal wall plugs Drilling template
